public_summary: Remote Linux VM preflight passed with configured SE-Bench agent credentials and SeedEdge live-auth. Secret values, local credential paths, and shell command templates are intentionally omitted from the public repository.

linux_vm.message: Linux remote validation environment was reachable.

agent_credentials.message: Agent API credentials were configured in the VM environment; no secret values are published.

china_mirrors.message: Validation commands used PyPI/Node mirrors suitable for mainland China network conditions.
